seo_section.title: Discover Marrakech by Air
seo_section.content: Experience a premium hot air balloon Marrakech flight with Sky Experience. Our private sunrise flights offer breathtaking panoramic views over the Palm Grove and the Atlas Mountains. Whether you are looking for a romantic adventure or a luxury service, we provide the safest and most unforgettable Marrakech by air experience. Book your hot air balloon Morocco ride today and create memories that will last a lifetime.

footer.description: The most authentic hot air balloon experience in Marrakech.
footer.social_desc: Stay updated with our latest offers and sky adventures.

about_section.subtitle: Learn more about us
about_section.title: SKY EXPERIENCE
about_section.content_1: SKY EXPERIENCE is more than just a hot air balloon agency in Marrakech. It is a promise of escape. We turn your dream of flying into reality with absolute safety and premium service. Our sunrise flights offer a unique perspective on the Agafay Desert, the Palm Grove, and the majestic Atlas Mountains.
about_section.content_2: Composed of certified pilots and enthusiasts, our team has decades of experience in civil aviation. We are recognized as one of the best balloon flight specialists in Morocco, combining tradition, modernity, and strict adherence to international safety standards. Each flight is a celebration of the Moroccan sky.
about_section.content_3: Thanks to rigorous organization, modern equipment, and qualified supervision, SKY EXPERIENCE offers its passengers all the guarantees necessary to live an exceptional aerial adventure. Whether for a classic, private, VIP flight, a marriage proposal in a hot air balloon, or a birthday, each experience is tailored to create unique memories in the skies of Marrakech.

about_adventures.title: Experience a unique hot air balloon adventure
about_adventures.subtitle: Sky Experience Adventures
list: Soar over **Marrakech** and its breathtaking landscapes.
Enjoy **unforgettable views** of the Atlas Mountains and the desert.
Every detail has been carefully thought out for your comfort.

about_safety.title: Safety and comfort: our priorities
about_safety.subtitle: Safety first
list: At Sky Experience, **safety** is our absolute priority.
Our **certified pilots** will accompany you throughout the adventure.
Our balloons are perfectly maintained, ensuring both safety and comfort.

about_tailored.title: A flight adapted to your expectations
list: Whether you choose a **classic** or **private flight**, each experience is carefully planned to offer you a panoramic view of Marrakech.
Every moment spent in the air invites you to relax and fully appreciate the spectacular beauty of Morocco.

about_relax.title: A moment of relaxation and wonder
about_relax.content_1: A hot air balloon flight is a rare and peaceful experience, ideal for relaxing and marveling.
about_relax.content_2: Board a spacious and comfortable hot air balloon and let yourself be carried by the gentle breeze.
about_relax.content_3: Experience the serenity of flight while admiring the ever-changing landscapes beneath your eyes.

about_landscape.title: A journey through Moroccan landscapes
about_landscape.content: Let yourself be captivated by the beauty of Moroccan landscapes. From the air, you will enjoy unparalleled views of the vast palm groves of Marrakech, the **Atlas Mountains**, and the desert dunes. The sunrise offers spectacular colors, ideal for capturing unforgettable photos.

about_commitment.title: Our commitments: a worry-free experience
about_commitment.content: From booking to landing, we have taken care of everything. We handle all logistics: VIP transport, warm welcome, safety instructions, and personalized souvenirs. All you have to do is enjoy the experience.

testimonials.title: Client's Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: Providing The Best Services For Our Customers

items.name: Sarah J.
items.text: An absolute must-do in Marrakech! The sunrise views were breathtaking, and the pilot made us feel so safe and entertained. A magical experience from start to finish.

items.name: Ahmed K.
items.text: Superbe organisation. Le transfert était à l'heure, le petit déjeuner délicieux et le vol... juste incroyable. Merci à toute l'équipe Sky Experience.

items.name: Emily & Tom
items.text: We booked a private flight for our anniversary and it was perfection. Romantic, peaceful, and stunningly beautiful. Worth every penny.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions to prepare for your flight with peace of mind.

items.question: What time does the hot air balloon take off? When do we return?
items.answer: All flights take off at sunrise to guarantee magical lighting. Pickup in Marrakech is generally between 4:00 AM and 5:00 AM in summer and between 5:00 AM and 6:00 AM in winter. You will be back at your hotel between 9:15 AM and 10:15 AM.

items.question: Where does the hot air balloon take off?
items.answer: Our launch sites are located about 30 to 45 minutes from the center of Marrakech, offering breathtaking views of the Palm Grove and the Atlas Mountains. We provide round-trip transfer from your hotel or riad.

items.question: How long does the full experience last?
items.answer: The adventure lasts about 4 hours in total. This includes transfer, balloon preparation, the flight (45 to 60 min), a traditional Berber breakfast in a tent, and the return trip.

items.question: Do you offer group rates?
items.answer: Absolutely! We offer preferential rates for groups of 6 people or more. Contact us via WhatsApp to get a personalized quote.

items.question: What happens in case of bad weather?
items.answer: Your safety is our top priority. If the flight is cancelled due to weather conditions, we offer to reschedule the experience for the next day or receive a full refund.

items.question: Can I customize the flight for a special event?
items.answer: Yes! Whether it's a marriage proposal, a birthday, or a corporate event, we offer private custom flights with exclusive options (flowers, personalized banners, cake) to make this moment unforgettable.

items.question: Can children fly?
items.answer: Yes, children are welcome from 4 years old. Children aged 4 to 11 benefit from a special reduced rate.

items.question: How many passengers are in the basket?
items.answer: For our classic shared flights, the baskets accommodate between 12 and 16 people with separate compartments for your comfort. If you prefer more privacy, our Private and VIP Packs guarantee a basket exclusively reserved for you.
